title: The Best Value Form 1 Guns
description: If you will only ever file one Form 1, then it should be for an AR-15. The AR-15 is, without a doubt, the most modular rifle in the world—dare I say it’s the most modular weapon in the world? Since the serialized portion of the AR-15 is the lower receiver, all you need to do is Form 1 the lower. You can then swap the upper to switch calibers, barrel lengths, and purposes.
author: National Gun Owner
